title: Offer JSON Library
description: The common definitions from the Offers and Orders domain that can be reused in standard schemas

AccountedPrice.title: Accounted Price
AccountedPrice.description: An amount of money expected, required, or given in payment for something.

baseAmountGuaranteeTimeLimitDateTime.title: Accounted Price.Base Amount Guarantee Time Limit Date Time
baseAmountGuaranteeTimeLimitDateTime.description: The length of time the Base Amount of an offer item is guaranteed. In the absence of the Base Amount guarantee time limit, the Base Amount is not guaranteed. Upon expiry, the Base Amount may no longer be guaranteed and either a new shopping process should begin, or the offer should be repriced resulting in a new Offer. Should the Base Amount guarantee time limit extend beyond Order creation, the remaining length of time persists into the corresponding Order Item. The airline can increase the remaining length of time beyond the original time limit should they wish to. This field should only be used when the Airline indicates that a Price Guarantee is available.

consumptionTaxes.title: Each Accounted Price may have one and only one Consumption Tax Summary

curConversion.title: Each Accounted Price may has one or more Currency Conversions
curConversion.description: The result of converting one currency into another currency. E.g. local currency to USD, air miles to monetary.

equivAmount.title: Accounted Price.Equivalent Amount
equivAmount.description: The entire amount of transaction stated in the local currency at the point of sale, or the currency as defined by the Currency Indicator Code.

loyaltyUnitAmount.title: Accounted Price.Loyalty Unit Amount
loyaltyUnitAmount.description: Amount specified in loyalty units. Note: the 'Currency Code' sup for this BDT should not be populated.

loyaltyUnitName.title: Accounted Price.Loyalty Unit Name
loyaltyUnitName.description: The name of the loyalty unit used by the loyalty unit amount (e.g. miles or points).

maskedInd.title: Accounted Price.Masked Indicator
maskedInd.description: Indicator to advise the Seller if the price will be masked to the Customer

tfcSummary.title: Each Accounted Price may have one and only one TFC Summary
tfcSummary.description: Taxes, fees and charges (TFC) summary information

totalAmount.title: Accounted Price.Total Amount
totalAmount.description: Total monetary price amount, including all tax, surcharge, and fee amounts.

AirlineDesigCode.title: Airline Designator Code
AirlineDesigCode.description: Either the IATA-defined 2-character code or the ICAO-defined 3-character code of an airline, as per the length of the value.

AirlineDesigCodeEnum.title: Airline Designator Code
AirlineDesigCodeEnum.description: The codelist contents of IATA Resolution 762 airline codes, or of ICAO airline codes

AirlineTaxonomy.title: Airline Taxonomy
AirlineTaxonomy.description: Used in the context of the Airline Taxonomy to define a product or service to the seller or to request a collection of products and services from an airline. For more information on what values should be placed within these fields, see the implementation guide at: https://guides.developer.iata.org

descText.title: Airline Taxonomy.Description Text
descText.description: To enable the Airline to describe the Taxonomy without the need for the Seller to refer to a specifc Taxonomy optionally.

taxonomyCode.title: Airline Taxonomy.Taxonomy Code
taxonomyCode.description: Used for defining a product or service within the Shared Industry Taxonomy or bilaterally.

ALaCarteOffer.title: A La Carte Offer
ALaCarteOffer.description: A proposal to sell a specific set of products or Services under specific conditions, for a certain price. Can be the response to a shopping request. Can be a regular Offer or an A La Carte Offer. A La Carte Offer is defined as a container for A La Carte Offer Items. This supports a shopping basket concept for non-flight services. The main purpose of this structure is to reduce the size of the messages by inserting Offer Items which are applicable to multiple flight-related Offers. NB. For the OfferID of the ALaCarteOffer: Default OfferID identifier for A La Carte Offer Items in a scenario where items here are not selected for a flight-related Offer above. Business Identifier Fields: - [Shopping Response] Shopping Response ID - Offer ID - [Carrier] Airline Designator Code

baggageDisclosureRefIdentifier.title: A La Carte Offer.Baggage Disclosure Reference Identifier
baggageDisclosureRefIdentifier.description: Reference to a Bag Disclosure ID within this message.

commission.title: Each A La Carte Offer may have one or more related commissions one or more Commissions
commission.description: An amount of money, typically a set percentage of the value involved, paid to an agent in a commercial transaction.

desc.title: Each A La Carte Offer may have one or more one or more Descriptions
desc.description: An account or representation of the certain or major aspects, characteristics, or features of a person, object, or event.

disclosureRefIdentifier.title: A La Carte Offer.Disclosure Ref Identifier
disclosureRefIdentifier.description: Reference to a Disclosure ID within this message.

matchAppText.title: A La Carte Offer.Match Application Text
matchAppText.description: Specifies which type of flight request the match information relate to (examples: Attribute, Affinity, Other).

matchPercent.title: A La Carte Offer.Match Percent
matchPercent.description: Offer match percentage to shopping criteria type. This information should be populated when there is a partial match of the initial shopping criteria. Example: 60

matchTypeCode.title: A La Carte Offer.Match Type Code
matchTypeCode.description: Offer match to shopping criteria type. Examples: Full, None, Partial, Other Note: An additional percentage qualifier, such as 50%, may be specified for a Partial match.

offerExpirationTimeLimitDateTime.title: A La Carte Offer.Offer Expiration Time Limit Date Time
offerExpirationTimeLimitDateTime.description: The length of time an offer will persist in an airline's offer management system for use in subsequent transactions. Upon expiry, the expectation is that the offer is no longer retrievable and the shopping process must begin again. Note the presence of an Offer Time Limit does not indicate either a guarantee of price or inventory against a given Offer item within the Offer. Should the offer time limit expire, any other time limit also expires unless an Order has been created or changed.

offerIdentifier.title: A La Carte Offer.Offer Identifier
offerIdentifier.description: Carrier assigned ID which uniquely identifies a specific Offer across several messages. Offer ID facilitates the tracking and verification of individually priced offer(s) selected from the shopping response. Only the Offer IDs of the ORA (Offer Responsible Airline) are returned in shopping responses. Offer ID is unique to each individually priced offer in the shopping response even if the offer price is zero. Offer ID may be specific to individual passengers in the offer, and may be associated with a segment or a journey. The set of Offer IDs returned in a response are referenced by a Shopping Response ID.

offerItem.title: Each A La Carte Offer must has one or more at least one A La Carte Offer Items
offerItem.description: A priced grouping of one or more services within an Offer. The A La Carte Offer Item assigns a total price for all included services for all passengers and all segments referenced. Once constructed, the OfferItem cannot be modified.

ownerCode.title: A La Carte Offer.Owner Code
ownerCode.description: Airline code assigned to a carrier. Either ICAO-defined 3-character code or IATA-defined 2-character code.

penaltyRefIdentifier.title: A La Carte Offer.Penalty Ref Identifier

redemptionInd.title: A La Carte Offer.Redemption Indicator
redemptionInd.description: When TRUE, this Offer must be redeemed, e.g. it cannot be purchased. Note: Taxes may still apply.

requestedDateInd.title: A La Carte Offer.Requested Date Indicator
requestedDateInd.description: Indicator to specify if the offer relates to a requested date. For example in calendar search, this indicator will be set to 'true' if this airline offer is for a requested date and will not be present (or will be set to 'false' if airline offer is for another date than requested one.

richMedia.title: Each A La Carte Offer may one or more Media Resource References
richMedia.description: An external resource such as an Image, Video, PDF or other which is available for display

totalPrice.title: Each A La Carte Offer may has one and only one Price
totalPrice.description: DEPRECATED - This element is deprecated as of 24.4 and will be decommissioned in a future release of the standards. Please consult implementation guidance on alternatives to this element. The amount of money expected, required, or given in payment for something.

validatingCarrierCode.title: A La Carte Offer.Validating Carrier Code
validatingCarrierCode.description: Airline code assigned to a carrier. Either ICAO-defined 3-character code or IATA-defined 2-character code.

ALaCarteOfferItem.title: A La Carte Offer Item
ALaCarteOfferItem.description: A priced grouping of one or more services within an Offer. The A La Carte Offer Item assigns a total price for all included services for all passengers and all segments referenced. Once constructed, the OfferItem cannot be modified.

airlineTaxonomy.title: Each A La Carte Offer Item may have one or more Airline Taxonomies
airlineTaxonomy.description: Used in the context of the Airline Taxonomy to define a product or service to the seller or to request a collection of products and services from an airline. For more information on what values should be placed within these fields, see the implementation guide at: https://guides.developer.iata.org

aLaCarteOfferPaymentTimeLimit.title: A La Carte Offer Payment Time Limit
aLaCarteOfferPaymentTimeLimit.description: A La Carte Offer Item Payment Time Limit

oneOf.title: Each A La Carte Offer Item may have payment time limits one and only one Payment Time Limit Date
oneOf.description: A container for a payment time limit date.

oneOf.title: Each A La Carte Offer Item may have payment time limits one and only one Payment Time Limit Duration
oneOf.description: A container for a payment time limit duration.

cancelRestrictions.title: Each A La Carte Offer Item may one or more Cancel Restrictionss
cancelRestrictions.description: These are a set of qualifying conditions/rules/restrictions that are related to a constrained priced grouping of services for the Cancellation action.

changeRestrictions.title: Each A La Carte Offer Item may one or more Change Restrictionss
changeRestrictions.description: These are a set of qualifying conditions/rules/restriction that are related to a constrained priced grouping of services for a Change/modification action.

commission.title: Each A La Carte Offer Item may have one or more Commissions
commission.description: An amount of money, typically a set percentage of the value involved, paid to an agent in a commercial transaction.

eligibility.title: Each A La Carte Offer Item must Has one and only one Eligibility
eligibility.description: Refers to the Passengers, Price class or segments for which this offer item is eligible.

offerItemIdentifier.title: A La Carte Offer Item.Offer Item Identifier
offerItemIdentifier.description: Carrier assigned ID which exists uniquely within an Offer. Exceeding 64 characters or use of dashes is not recommended.

offerItemTypeCode.title: A La Carte Offer Item.Offer Item Type Code
offerItemTypeCode.description: Specify the type of Offer Item being presented to the Customer. Using new PADIS codeset -initial content -RET - Retail -WHO - Wholesale -COR - Corporate

ownerCode.title: A La Carte Offer Item.Owner Code
ownerCode.description: Airline code assigned to a carrier. Either ICAO-defined 3-character code or IATA-defined 2-character code.

priceGuaranteeTimeLimitDateTime.title: A La Carte Offer Item.Price Guarantee Time Limit Date Time
priceGuaranteeTimeLimitDateTime.description: The length of time the price of an offer item is guaranteed. In the absence of the price guarantee time limit, the price is not guaranteed. Upon expiry, the price may no longer be guaranteed and either a new shopping process should begin, or the offer should be repriced resulting in a new Offer. Should the price guarantee time limit extend beyond Order creation (or change), the remaining length of time persists into the corresponding Order Item. At Order creation (or change) the airline can increase the remaining length of time beyond the original time limit should they wish to. Note: Where a price guarantee time limit is applied, there is no guarantee that related inventory is guaranteed by the airline.

richMedia.title: Each A La Carte Offer Item may one or more Media Resource References
richMedia.description: An external resource such as an Image, Video, PDF or other which is available for display

unitPrice.title: Each A La Carte Offer Item must has one and only one Price
unitPrice.description: The amount of money expected, required, or given in payment for something.

webAddressUri.title: A La Carte Offer Item.Web Address URI
webAddressUri.description: Deep linking into another site to complete the transaction. E.g. to bring the customer directly to a page to continue with a purchase of a specific offer.

Amount.title: Amount
Amount.description: An amount is a number of monetary units specified in a currency.

curCode.title: Amount.Currency. Code
curCode.description: Currency Code as per ISO 4217 alphabetic code e.g. EUR, USD, AUD

value.title: Amount.Content
value.description: A number of monetary units specified in a currency where the unit of currency is explicit or implied.

BagDisclosureRuleTypeCode.title: Bag Disclosure Rule Type Code
BagDisclosureRuleTypeCode.description: Additional BDT to specify the Baggage Disclosure Rule Type.

BagDisclosureRuleTypeCodeEnum.title: Bag Disclosure Rule Type Code
BagDisclosureRuleTypeCodeEnum.description: Enumeration values for Bag Disclosure Rule Type. Valid Values: D - Disclosure with no US DOT Reservation; N - No Disclosure or US DOT Reservation; Other - Other; Y - Disclosure and US DOT Reservation

BaggageAllowance.title: Baggage Allowance
BaggageAllowance.description: The amount of checked or carry-on luggage the airline will allow per passenger.

airlineTaxonomy.title: Each Baggage Allowance may one and only one Airline Taxonomy
airlineTaxonomy.description: Used in the context of the Airline Taxonomy to define a product or service to the seller or to request a collection of products and services from an airline. For more information on what values should be placed within these fields, see the implementation guide at: https://guides.developer.iata.org

applicablePartyText.title: Baggage Allowance.Applicable Party Text
applicablePartyText.description: Baggage weight restriction application. Examples: Party, Traveler. Party applies to all Travelers.

baggageAllowanceIdentifier.title: Baggage Allowance.Baggage Allowance Identifier
baggageAllowanceIdentifier.description: Unique identifier of this Baggage Allowance.

descText.title: Baggage Allowance.Description Text
descText.description: Baggage Allowance description and additional information.

rfisc.title: Baggage Allowance.RFISC
rfisc.description: Reason For Issuance Sub Code. Examples: 0CC (First Checked Bag) 0B1 (In-flight Entertainment) 0BX (Lounge)

typeCode.title: Baggage Allowance.Type Code
typeCode.description: Type of Baggage Allowance. E.g. Checked or CarryOn.

baggageAllowance.title: Each Baggage Allowance List must Has one or more at least one Baggage Allowances
baggageAllowance.description: The amount of checked or carry-on luggage the airline will allow per passenger.

BaggageDisclosure.title: Baggage Disclosure
BaggageDisclosure.description: Disclosure information specifically related to baggage.

baggageDisclosureIdentifier.title: Baggage Disclosure.Baggage Disclosure Identifier
baggageDisclosureIdentifier.description: Uniquely identifies a Bag Disclosure within the message.

checkInChargesInd.title: Baggage Disclosure.Check In Charges Indicator
checkInChargesInd.description: If TRUE, additional taxes, fees and charges may be collected at check-in (regionally determined).

commercialAgreementIdentifier.title: Baggage Disclosure.Commercial Agreement Identifier
commercialAgreementIdentifier.description: Bilateral agreement identifier E.g. baggage cost, Baggage Determining Carrier, etc.

deferralInd.title: Baggage Disclosure.Deferral Indicator
deferralInd.description: If TRUE, The ORA advises the POA that the POA is given the Baggage Determining Carrier designation

desc.title: Each Baggage Disclosure may has one or more Descriptions
desc.description: An account or representation of the certain or major aspects, characteristics, or features of a person, object, or event.

fixedPrePaidInd.title: Baggage Disclosure.Fixed Pre Paid Indicator
fixedPrePaidInd.description: Allows POA to tell the ORA if the ORA may alter the POA's pre-paid baggage charges. If TRUE, prepaid charge may NOT be altered If FALSE, prepaid charge MAY be altered

ruleTypeCode.title: Baggage Disclosure.Rule Type Code
ruleTypeCode.description: US Department of Transportation (DOT) Reservation or Disclosure baggage rule. Examples: Y, Disclosure AND US DOT Reservation

baggageDisclosure.title: Each Baggage Disclosure List must Has one or more at least one Baggage Disclosures
baggageDisclosure.description: Disclosure information specifically related to baggage.

BaggageTypeCode.title: Baggage Type Code
BaggageTypeCode.description: Additional BDT to specify baggage type code.

CancelRestrictions.title: Cancel Restrictions
CancelRestrictions.description: These are a set of qualifying conditions/rules/restrictions that are related to a constrained priced grouping of services for the Cancellation action.

allowedModificationInd.title: Cancel Restrictions.Allowed Modification Indicator
allowedModificationInd.description: Flags if cancellation is allowed used in conjunction with defined date ranges.

descText.title: Cancel Restrictions.Description Text
descText.description: Describes what this restriction is. E.G -Cancellation allowed within dates(1) specified with no fee. -Cancellation allowed within dates(2) specified with fee. -Cancellation not allowed

effectiveDateTime.title: Cancel Restrictions.Effective Date Time
effectiveDateTime.description: This identifies the effective date used in conjunction with the Expiration date to qualify the applicability of this condition This date is relative to the first flight segment.

expirationDateTime.title: Cancel Restrictions.Expiration Date Time
expirationDateTime.description: This identifies the Expiration date used in conjunction with the Effective date to qualify the applicability of this condition This date is relative to the first flight segment.

journeyStageCode.title: Cancel Restrictions.Journey Stage Code
journeyStageCode.description: Valid Stage Codes are defined in the Journey Stage Type Code ENUM PRIOR TO DEPARTURE NO SHOW AFTER DEPARTURE This will be used either in addition to other BBIE's or individually to qualify a condition.

paxRefIdentifier.title: Cancel Restrictions.Passenger Reference Identifier
paxRefIdentifier.description: Used to store a ref to the passenger.

Carrier.title: Carrier
Carrier.description: The organization which carries the passenger, baggage, or goods, and/or commits to delivering the carriage as well as any related services such as issuance of ticket, creation of Order, etc. Business Identifier Fields: - Airline Designator Code - Duplicate Designator Indicator - Name

airlineDesigCode.title: Carrier.Airline Designator Code
airlineDesigCode.description: Airline code assigned to a carrier. Either ICAO-defined 3-character code or IATA-defined 2-character code.

duplicateDesigInd.title: Carrier.Duplicate Designator Indicator
duplicateDesigInd.description: Indicates that the IATA Airline Designator is a duplicate code shared by multiple airlines. To identify the airline - in this case - its name must be specified in addition to the designator.

ChangeRestrictions.title: Change Restrictions
ChangeRestrictions.description: These are a set of qualifying conditions/rules/restriction that are related to a constrained priced grouping of services for a Change/modification action.

allowedModificationInd.title: Change Restrictions.Allowed Modification Indicator
allowedModificationInd.description: This flags if this condition allows any modification. If this is set to FALSE then the condition further identified by the other attributes indicates that no Change is allowed.

changeTypeCode.title: Change Restrictions.Change Type Code
changeTypeCode.description: This identifies using Change type Code ENUM the type of change that applies to the condition. valid examples are NAME FLIGHT SERVICE

descText.title: Change Restrictions.Description Text
descText.description: Describes what this restriction is. E.G -Change allowed within dates(1) specified with associated fee. --Change allowed within dates(2) specified with associated fee. - No change allowed

effectiveDateTime.title: Change Restrictions.Effective Date Time
effectiveDateTime.description: This identifies the effective date used in conjunction with the Expiration date to qualify the applicability of this condition This date is relative to the first flight segment.

expirationDateTime.title: Change Restrictions.Expiration Date Time
expirationDateTime.description: This identifies the Expiration date used in conjunction with the Effective date to qualify the applicability of this condition This date is relative to the first flight segment.

journeyStageCode.title: Change Restrictions.Journey Stage Code
journeyStageCode.description: Valid Stage Codes are defined in the Journey Stage Type Code ENUM PRIOR TO DEPARTURE NO SHOW AFTER DEPARTURE This will be used either in addition to other BBIE's or individually to qualify a condition.

paxRefIdentifier.title: Change Restrictions.Passenger Ref Identifier
paxRefIdentifier.description: Used to store a ref to the passenger.

ChangeTypeCode.title: Change Type Code
ChangeTypeCode.description: This will have an associated ENUM which contains codes to represent the types of Changes that can be made to an offer.

ChangeTypeCodeEnum.title: Change Type Code
ChangeTypeCodeEnum.description: Contains list of types of changes allowed Name, Flight Services Valid Values: Flight - This identifies Flight detail changes. changes to the core flight details. departure and arrival points and airline.; Name - Name based changes. Changes to the passenger(s) names.; Service - This identifies Service non flight changes. seat preferences/food/baggage etc.

ClearanceMethods.title: Clearance Methods
ClearanceMethods.description: These are the clearance options with their supporting information proposed by the carrier for a given offer. It supplies the methods available to clear a payment. It is part of the 'Payment Supported Method', and it is relevant whenever the method of payment will require clearance of funds between the partners of the sale. Includes the Commission data to allow the carrier to support choices that are in line with its payment policy.

commission.title: Each Clearance Methods may Result in one and only one Commission
commission.description: An amount of money, typically a set percentage of the value involved, paid to an agent in a commercial transaction.

netClearanceAmount.title: Clearance Methods.Net Clearance Amount
netClearanceAmount.description: The funds to be cleared as a result of the payment commitment, the selected payment method, and the date when the funds must be remitted. It is the amount the Clearance Payer must pay to the Clearance Payee on a given Remittance Date taking into consideration any funds due to the Clearance Payer by the Clearance Payee as a result of the same payment commitment.

processRuleCode.title: Clearance Methods.Process Rule Code
processRuleCode.description: defines under what governing rules, process and reporting standard the Clearance Manager processes the clearance. Example: IATAC00 or BLTRL00 or NDCLNK0

remittanceDate.title: Clearance Methods.Remittance Date
remittanceDate.description: The date when the amount in the clearance request that is paid by the Clearance Payer will have to reach the settlement manager's bank account

ClearanceProcessRuleCode.title: Clearance Process Rule Code
ClearanceProcessRuleCode.description: Character string of letters and numbers to describe the governance for the Clearance process.

Code.title: Code
Code.description: A code is a character string of letters, numbers, special characters (except escape sequences), and symbols.

value.title: Code.Content
value.description: A character string (letters, figures or symbols) that for brevity and/or language independence may be used to represent or replace a definitive value or text of an attribute.

CollectionPointTax.title: Collection Point Tax
CollectionPointTax.description: Tax data breakdown by collection point for XF(Passenger Facility Fee) and ZP(federal tax segment) taxes.

airportAmount.title: Collection Point Tax.Airport Amount
airportAmount.description: Amount filed by the airport in the currency applicable to the geographical location of the airport.

station.title: Each Collection Point Tax must is one and only one Station
station.description: Location or facility where air or surface transportation originates, stops and/or terminates, and where passengers and/or cargo can be taken on or off. Those of relevance to the airline industry are identified by an IATA Location Identifier (3 letter location identifier). There are also additional airports without an IATA identifier that may be used in disruption scenarios that will be identified by an ICAO 4 letter code (assigned to every registered airport, military or civil). Business Identifier Fields: - IATA Location Code

Commission.title: Commission
Commission.description: An amount of money, typically a set percentage of the value involved, paid to an agent in a commercial transaction.

amount.title: Commission.Amount
amount.description: Commission amount and currency code. Example: 20 USD

percentageAppliedToAmount.title: Commission.Percentage Applied To Amount
percentageAppliedToAmount.description: The amount to which the percentage will be applied. For Example: Net Amount Gross Amoun Difference between the Net and Gross amounts.

taxableInd.title: Commission.Taxable Indicator
taxableInd.description: When TRUE, the commission amount specified is subject to Tax/VAT.

ConsumptionTax.title: Consumption Tax
ConsumptionTax.description: A tax imposed on the sale of goods or services, or on TFCs, which may take the form of sales taxes, tariffs, value added tax (VAT), or goods and services tax (GST), varying by jurisdiction.

consumptionTaxInfo.title: Each Consumption Tax may have one or more Consumption Tax Informations
consumptionTaxInfo.description: Information related to a consumption tax

consumptionTaxTypeCode.title: Consumption Tax.Consumption Tax Type Code
consumptionTaxTypeCode.description: Code defining the category of consumption tax based on ATSB codeset XXXX

jurisdiction.title: Each Consumption Tax may be subject to one and only one Jurisdiction
jurisdiction.description: The legal authority to impose, administer, and collect taxes within a defined scope based on territory, persons, or economic activity.

notIncludedTotalTaxAmount.title: Consumption Tax.Not Included Total Tax Amount
notIncludedTotalTaxAmount.description: The sum of Consumption Tax Amounts for all Consumption Tax Information that have Included Indicator set to false. This amount is included in Total Consumption Tax Amount.

pointOfSale.title: Each Consumption Tax must be subject to one and only one Point Of Sale
pointOfSale.description: Country and Sub-division of sale of goods or services.

totalTaxAmount.title: Consumption Tax.Total Tax Amount
totalTaxAmount.description: The sum of Consumption Tax Amounts for all Consumption Tax Information

ConsumptionTaxInfo.title: Consumption Tax Information
ConsumptionTaxInfo.description: Information related to a consumption tax

appliesToText.title: Consumption Tax Information.Applies To Text
appliesToText.description: Describes amount type (e.g. base amount, tax amount) on which consumption tax applies

grossAmount.title: Consumption Tax Information.Gross Amount
grossAmount.description: The amount a customer needs to pay including consumption taxes

includedInd.title: Consumption Tax Information.Included Indicator
includedInd.description: When TRUE, specified consumption tax amount is included in the amount on which consumption tax applies. When FALSE, specified consumption tax amount is not included in the amount on which consumption tax applies. Note: consumption tax may apply on base or tax or base + tax etc.

netAmount.title: Consumption Tax Information.Net Amount
netAmount.description: The amount a customer needs to pay excluding consumption taxes

nonTaxableInfo.title: Each Consumption Tax Information may have one and only one Non Taxable Information

taxableBaseAmount.title: Consumption Tax Information.Taxable Base Amount
taxableBaseAmount.description: The amount used to calculate consumption tax. This is the amount to which TaxPercent is applied.

taxableGrossAmount.title: Consumption Tax Information.Taxable Gross Amount
taxableGrossAmount.description: The amount a customer needs to pay including the applicable consumption tax, but excluding any portions that are not subject to consumption tax.

taxAmount.title: Consumption Tax Information.Tax Amount
taxAmount.description: The amount of the particular consumption tax

taxExemptionInfo.title: Each Consumption Tax Information may have one and only one Tax Exemption Information

consumptionTax.title: Each Consumption Tax Summary must have at least one Consumption Taxs
consumptionTax.description: A tax imposed on the sale of goods or services, or on TFCs, which may take the form of sales taxes, tariffs, value added tax (VAT), or goods and services tax (GST), varying by jurisdiction.

ConsumptionTaxTypeCode.title: Consumption Tax Type Code
ConsumptionTaxTypeCode.description: Indicates the type of consumption tax (e.g. VAT, GST, CPS).

ConsumptionTaxTypeCodeEnum.title: Consumption Tax Type Code
ConsumptionTaxTypeCodeEnum.description: Identifies the type of consumption tax, such as VAT, GST, CPS

ContactInfo.title: Contact Information
ContactInfo.description: The electronic or geographic address which a party has provided as the contact channel. For example, contact email, contact postal address, contact phone number.

contactInfoIdentifier.title: Contact Information.Contact Info Identifier
contactInfoIdentifier.description: Uniquely Identifies a set of Contact Information, within the context of one message.

contactPurposeText.title: Contact Information.Contact Purpose Text
contactPurposeText.description: to identify the contact purpose (PADIS code list 3299)

contactRefusedInd.title: Contact Information.Contact Refused Indicator
contactRefusedInd.description: When TRUE, Contact Information was refused to be provided.

paxSegmentRefIdentifier.title: Contact Information.Passenger Segment Reference Identifier
paxSegmentRefIdentifier.description: Uniquely identifies a Passenger Segment within the context of one message.

postalAddress.title: Each Contact Information may contains one or more Postal Addresss
postalAddress.description: Natural or physical address used for postal service. May be a building address, airport address, etc.

relationshipToPax.title: Contact Information.Relationship To Passenger
relationshipToPax.description: Relationship to the passenger e.g. used for when this individual is an emergency contact

contactInfo.title: Each Contact Information List must has 1 or more contacts at least one Contact Informations
contactInfo.description: The electronic or geographic address which a party has provided as the contact channel. For example, contact email, contact postal address, contact phone number.

Country.title: Country
Country.description: A nation with its own government, occupying a particular territory.

countryCode.title: Country.Country Code
countryCode.description: ISO Country Code 3166-1 alpha-2 (can be extended by bilateral agreement in case of exceptions, e.g. Kosovo). Examples: US, FR.

countryName.title: Country.Country Name
countryName.description: The name, expressed as text, of the country.

CountryCodeEnum.title: Country Code
CountryCodeEnum.description: The code list of ISO 3166 two-alpha Country Codes

CountrySubDivision.title: Country Sub-Division
CountrySubDivision.description: An area of land which is a sub-division within a country, such as a state, a county, a canton, a province, etc.

countrySubDivisionCode.title: Country Sub-Division.Country Sub-Division Code
countrySubDivisionCode.description: ISO code 3166-2 identifying this country sub-division within a given country. E.g. 'US-AZ' for state of Arizona (United States of America), 'DE-BY' for region of Bavaria (Germany).

countrySubDivisionName.title: Country Sub-Division.Country Sub-Division Name
countrySubDivisionName.description: The name, expressed as text, of the sub-division of a country.

CountrySubDivisionCode.title: Country Sub-Division Code
CountrySubDivisionCode.description: ISO 3166-2 Country Sub-Division Code. Max-3-char sub-division code without preceding country code. E.g. 'AZ' for Arizona, 'BY' for Bavaria region in Germany.

CountrySubDivisionCodeEnum.title: Country Sub-Division Code
CountrySubDivisionCodeEnum.description: The list of Country Sub-Division Codes in ISO 3166-2, or referenced from ISO 3166-2 for the specific countries. Max-3-char sub-division code without preceding country code.

CurConversion.title: Currency Conversion
CurConversion.description: The result of converting one currency into another currency. E.g. local currency to USD, air miles to monetary.

amount.title: Currency Conversion.Amount
amount.description: Amount and currency specified in the converted currency. Example: 15000 USD

datedOperatingSegmentRefId.title: Dated Marketing Segment.Dated Operating Segment Ref Id

DatedMarketingSegmentList.description: A list of dated marketing segments used in the contained message.

datedMarketingSegment.description: The commercial designation under which a Dated Operating Segment can be booked, either under the operating carrier's designator or that of another carrier (codeshare).

DatedOperatingLeg.title: Dated Operating Leg
DatedOperatingLeg.description: The nonstop operation of a transport vehicle between the departure station and the arrival station. Can be used for aircrafts as well as other transport vehicles such as train or bus etc.

For more information on what values should be placed within these fields, see the implementation guide at: https://guides.developer.iata.org

distanceMeasure.description: Total distance between the beginning and end stations of a leg, measured by the great circle of the earth.

onGroundDuration.title: Dated Operating Leg.On Ground Duration
onGroundDuration.description: Total time the aircraft remains on the Ground between this leg and the leg which immediately precedes it.

richMedia.title: Each Dated Operating Leg may one or more Media Resource References

carrierDesigCode.title: Dated Operating Segment.Carrier Designator Code

datedOperatingLegRefIdentifier.title: Dated Operating Segment.Dated Operating Leg Reference Identifier

operationalSuffixText.title: Dated Operating Segment.Operational Suffix Text

DistributionChain.title: Distribution Chain
DistributionChain.description: An instance of a distribution channel, which is a chain of intermediaries through which a good or service passes until it reaches the final buyer or the end consumer.

distributionChainLink.title: Each Distribution Chain must comprise at least one Distribution Chain Links
distributionChainLink.description: An organization playing a participating role in an instance of a distribution channel.

DistributionChainLink.title: Distribution Chain Link
DistributionChainLink.description: An organization playing a participating role in an instance of a distribution channel.

contactInfo.title: Each Distribution Chain Link may be contacted via one and only one Contact Information
contactInfo.description: The electronic or geographic address which a party has provided as the contact channel. For example, contact email, contact postal address, contact phone number.

ordinal.title: Distribution Chain Link.Ordinal
ordinal.description: The number defining the position of the distribution chain link in the distribution chain indicating the order in which the organization participated.

orgRole.title: Distribution Chain Link.Organization Role
orgRole.description: The distribution chain role performed by the participating organization. That is, the Seller (end buyer facing), the Distributor (an intermediary), or the Carrier (the Responsible Supplier). For clarity this is different to the business model used by the participating organization, and the Nature of Business typically registered during incorporation as one of the organization's business activities.

participatingOrg.title: Each Distribution Chain Link must be performed by one and only one Participating Organization
participatingOrg.description: An organized structure set up for a particular purpose, such as a business, government body, department, charity, or financial institution.

salesAgent.title: Each Distribution Chain Link may one and only one Sales Agent
salesAgent.description: An individual conducting sales activities on behalf of a sales branch or organization.

salesBranch.title: Each Distribution Chain Link may one and only one Sales Branch
salesBranch.description: An organizational unit with responsibility over sales in a market, for a product or service and under any other specified criteria.

verifiablePresentation.title: Distribution Chain Link.Verifiable Presentation
verifiablePresentation.description: The root mode of the IATA Verifiable Presentation schema structure based on w3c Verifiable Credential Schema

DistributionChainRoleCode.title: Distribution Chain Role Code
DistributionChainRoleCode.description: The list of allowable roles in a distribution chain.

Valid Values: Carrier - An organization which carries the passenger, baggage, or goods, and/or commits to delivering the carriage.; Distributor - An organization that provides a distribution capability such as a certain type of Consolidator, an Aggregator, more generally an intermediary.; Seller - An organization that offers a shopping capability to a shopper.

fareWaiver.title: Each Fare Detail may has between zero and five Fare Waivers
fareWaiver.description: Validating carrier-assigned fare rule modification or override information.

filedFareInd.title: Fare Detail.Filed Fare Indicator
filedFareInd.description: When TRUE, a component of this fare has been priced using filed fare data. If FALSE, dynamic pricing has been applied.

netReportingCodeText.title: Fare Detail.Net Reporting Code Text
netReportingCodeText.description: Code indicating if the transaction is subject to a net reporting arrangement.

pricingSystemCodeText.title: Fare Detail.Pricing System Code Text
pricingSystemCodeText.description: IATA assigned code identifying the system used to price the itinerary for the document being issued.

statisticalCodeText.title: Fare Detail.Statistical Code Text
statisticalCodeText.description: Code used for domestic or international sales differentiation.

FarePriceType.title: Fare Price Type
FarePriceType.description: An additional specified fare pricing such as 'Net' and 'Filed'. For 'Sell' or public amounts, use the Price in Fare Details.

farePriceTypeCode.title: Fare Price Type.Fare Price Type Code
farePriceTypeCode.description: Indicates if the fare price provided is a filed amount, or a net amount.

price.title: Each Fare Price Type must Has a one and only one Price
price.description: The amount of money expected, required, or given in payment for something.

FarePriceTypeCodeEnum.title: Fare Price Type Code
FarePriceTypeCodeEnum.description: An enum of a fare price type defining the types of fare price allowed. Valid Values: Filed - Filed; Net - Net

fareRuleWaiverCode.title: Fare Waiver.Fare Rule Waiver Code
fareRuleWaiverCode.description: Code assigned by the validating carrier that allows fare rule modification or override.

fareWaiverTypeCode.title: Fare Waiver.Fare Waiver Type Code
fareWaiverTypeCode.description: Waiver type code. Examples: ExchangeReissued, FareComponent.

FlightNumberText.title: Flight Number Text
FlightNumberText.description: Identifies a flight number. 1 to 4 digits. May or may not have leading zeros when less than 4 digits. The use of leading zeros does not create a different Flight Number. For example, Flight Numbers 123 and 0123 are the same.

value.description: Identifies a flight number. 1 to 4 digits. May or may not have leading zeros when less than 4 digits. The use of leading zeros does not create a different Flight Number. For example, Flight Numbers 123 and 0123 are the same.

InternalValueNewOffer.title: Internal Value New Offer
InternalValueNewOffer.description: New Offer: A proposal to sell a specific set of products or Services under specific conditions, for a certain price. Can be the response to a shopping request. Can be a regular Offer or an A La Carte Offer. A La Carte Offer is defined as a container for A La Carte Offer Items. This supports a shopping basket concept for non-flight services. The main purpose of this structure is to reduce the size of the messages by inserting Offer Items which are applicable to multiple flight-related Offers. NB. For the OfferID of the ALaCarteOffer: Default OfferID identifier for A La Carte Offer Items in a scenario where items here are not selected for a flight-related Offer above. Business Identifier Fields: - [Shopping Response] Shopping Response ID - Offer ID - [Carrier] Airline Designator Code

baggageDisclosureRefIdentifier.title: Internal Value New Offer.Baggage Disclosure Reference Identifier
baggageDisclosureRefIdentifier.description: Reference to a Bag Disclosure ID within this message.

commission.title: Each Internal Value New Offer may have one or more related commissions one or more Commissions
commission.description: An amount of money, typically a set percentage of the value involved, paid to an agent in a commercial transaction.

desc.title: Each Internal Value New Offer may have one or more one or more Descriptions
desc.description: An account or representation of the certain or major aspects, characteristics, or features of a person, object, or event.

disclosureRefIdentifier.title: Internal Value New Offer.Disclosure Reference Identifier
disclosureRefIdentifier.description: Reference to a Disclosure ID within this message.

internalValueOfferItem.title: Each Internal Value New Offer must has one or more at least one Internal Value New Offer Items
internalValueOfferItem.description: A priced grouping of one or more services within an Offer. The New Offer Item assigns a total price for all included services for all passengers and all segments referenced. Once constructed, the OfferItem cannot be modified.

matchAppText.title: Internal Value New Offer.Match Application Text
matchAppText.description: Specifies which type of flight request the match information relate to (examples: Attribute, Affinity, Other).

matchPercent.title: Internal Value New Offer.Match Percent
matchPercent.description: Offer match percentage to shopping criteria type. This information should be populated when there is a partial match of the initial shopping criteria. Example: 60

matchTypeCode.title: Internal Value New Offer.Match Type Code
matchTypeCode.description: Offer match to shopping criteria type. Examples: Full, None, Partial, Other Note: An additional percentage qualifier, such as 50%, may be specified for a Partial match.

offerExpirationTimeLimitDateTime.title: Internal Value New Offer.Offer Expiration Time Limit Date Time
offerExpirationTimeLimitDateTime.description: The length of time an offer will persist in an airline's offer management system for use in subsequent transactions. Upon expiry, the expectation is that the offer is no longer retrievable and the shopping process must begin again. Note the presence of an Offer Time Limit does not indicate either a guarantee of price or inventory against a given Offer item within the Offer. Should the offer time limit expire, any other time limit also expires unless an Order has been created or changed.

offerIdentifier.title: Internal Value New Offer.Offer Identifier
offerIdentifier.description: Carrier assigned ID which uniquely identifies a specific Offer across several messages. Offer ID facilitates the tracking and verification of individually priced offer(s) selected from the shopping response. Only the Offer IDs of the ORA (Offer Responsible Airline) are returned in shopping responses. Offer ID is unique to each individually priced offer in the shopping response even if the offer price is zero. Offer ID may be specific to individual passengers in the offer, and may be associated with a segment or a journey. The set of Offer IDs returned in a response are referenced by a Shopping Response ID.

ownerCode.title: Internal Value New Offer.Owner Code
ownerCode.description: Airline code assigned to a carrier. Either ICAO-defined 3-character code or IATA-defined 2-character code.

penaltyRefIdentifier.title: Internal Value New Offer.Penalty Reference Identifier

redemptionInd.title: Internal Value New Offer.Redemption Indicator
redemptionInd.description: When TRUE, this Offer must be redeemed, e.g. it cannot be purchased. Note: Taxes may still apply.

requestedDateInd.title: Internal Value New Offer.Requested Date Indicator
requestedDateInd.description: Indicator to specify if the offer relates to a requested date. For example in calendar search, this indicator will be set to 'true' if this airline offer is for a requested date and will not be present (or will be set to 'false' if airline offer is for another date than requested one.

richMedia.title: Each Internal Value New Offer may one or more Media Resource References
richMedia.description: An external resource such as an Image, Video, PDF or other which is available for display

totalPrice.title: Each Internal Value New Offer may has one and only one Price
totalPrice.description: DEPRECATED - This element is deprecated as of 24.4 and will be decommissioned in a future release of the standards. Please consult implementation guidance on alternatives to this element. The amount of money expected, required, or given in payment for something.

validatingCarrierCode.title: Internal Value New Offer.Validating Carrier Code
validatingCarrierCode.description: Airline code assigned to a carrier. Either ICAO-defined 3-character code or IATA-defined 2-character code.

InternalValueNewOfferItem.title: Internal Value New Offer Item
InternalValueNewOfferItem.description: A priced grouping of one or more services within an Offer. The New Offer Item assigns a total price for all included services for all passengers and all segments referenced. Once constructed, the OfferItem cannot be modified.

airlineTaxonomy.title: Each Internal Value New Offer Item may Have one or more Airline Taxonomies
airlineTaxonomy.description: Used in the context of the Airline Taxonomy to define a product or service to the seller or to request a collection of products and services from an airline. For more information on what values should be placed within these fields, see the implementation guide at: https://guides.developer.iata.org

cancelRestrictions.title: Each Internal Value New Offer Item may Offer Items can have many Cancel restrictions one or more Cancel Restrictionss
cancelRestrictions.description: These are a set of qualifying conditions/rules/restrictions that are related to a constrained priced grouping of services for the Cancellation action.

changeRestrictions.title: Each Internal Value New Offer Item may Order Items can have many Change restrictions one or more Change Restrictionss
changeRestrictions.description: These are a set of qualifying conditions/rules/restriction that are related to a constrained priced grouping of services for a Change/modification action.

commission.title: Each Internal Value New Offer Item may have one or more Commissions
commission.description: An amount of money, typically a set percentage of the value involved, paid to an agent in a commercial transaction.

desc.title: Each Internal Value New Offer Item may Offer Items can have informational Descriptions one or more Descriptions
desc.description: An account or representation of the certain or major aspects, characteristics, or features of a person, object, or event.

fareDetail.title: Each Internal Value New Offer Item may one or more Fare Details
fareDetail.description: The amount charged by the carrier for the carriage of a passenger and his allowable free baggage.

mandatoryInd.title: Internal Value New Offer Item.Mandatory Indicator
mandatoryInd.description: If set to 'true', indicates mandatory Offer Items which cannot be removed from the Offer.

modificationProhibitedInd.title: Internal Value New Offer Item.Modification Prohibited Indicator
modificationProhibitedInd.description: POA to ORA only: to indicate that the offer is non-modifiable. This indicates to ORA that its offer is non-modifiable (e.g. Regulatory or brand protection reasons). If indicator is set to TRUE, modifications to the POA's offer ARE NOT allowed.

newOfferItemPaymentTimeLimit.title: New Offer Item Payment Time Limit
newOfferItemPaymentTimeLimit.description: Payment Time Limit of Internal Value New Offer Item

oneOf.title: Each Internal Value New Offer Item may have payment time limits one and only one Payment Time Limit Date
oneOf.description: A container for a payment time limit date.

oneOf.title: Each Internal Value New Offer Item may have payment time limits one and only one Payment Time Limit Duration
oneOf.description: A container for a payment time limit duration.

offerItemIdentifier.title: Internal Value New Offer Item.Offer Item Identifier
offerItemIdentifier.description: Carrier assigned ID which exists uniquely within an Offer. Exceeding 64 characters or use of dashes is not recommended.

offerItemTypeCode.title: Internal Value New Offer Item.Offer Item Type Code
offerItemTypeCode.description: Specify the type of Offer Item being presented to the Customer. Using new PADIS codeset -initial content -RET - Retail -WHO - Wholesale -COR - Corporate

ownerCode.title: Internal Value New Offer Item.Owner Code
ownerCode.description: Airline code assigned to a carrier. Either ICAO-defined 3-character code or IATA-defined 2-character code.

price.title: Each Internal Value New Offer Item must has one and only one Price
price.description: The amount of money expected, required, or given in payment for something.

priceGuaranteeTimeLimitDateTime.title: Internal Value New Offer Item.Price Guarantee Time Limit Date Time
priceGuaranteeTimeLimitDateTime.description: The length of time the price of an offer item is guaranteed. In the absence of the price guarantee time limit, the price is not guaranteed. Upon expiry, the price may no longer be guaranteed and either a new shopping process should begin, or the offer should be repriced resulting in a new Offer. Should the price guarantee time limit extend beyond Order creation (or change), the remaining length of time persists into the corresponding Order Item. At Order creation (or change) the airline can increase the remaining length of time beyond the original time limit should they wish to. Note: Where a price guarantee time limit is applied, there is no guarantee that related inventory is guaranteed by the airline.

richMedia.title: Each Internal Value New Offer Item may one or more Media Resource References
richMedia.description: An external resource such as an Image, Video, PDF or other which is available for display

service.title: Each Internal Value New Offer Item must Has 1 or more at least one Internal Value Offered Services
service.description: Offered Service is the instance of a specific flight or Service Definition as it has been offered (and eventually ordered and consumed) in the context of a specific Offer and/or Order. At the time of shopping, a service can be sold to multiple passengers on a given journey. At time of order, the services should be applied to a single passenger on a single segment.

stopOverRestrictions.title: Each Internal Value New Offer Item may have a stop over restriction one and only one Stop Over Restrictions
stopOverRestrictions.description: Additional information supplied by the Airline for the current Itinerary to advise the Seller that additional options could be available (if the Seller changes the request) to add Stop Overs within the itinerary.

webAddressUri.title: Internal Value New Offer Item.Web Address URI
webAddressUri.description: Deep linking into another site to complete the transaction. E.g. to bring the customer directly to a page to continue with a purchase of a specific offer.

InternalValueOfferedService.title: Internal Value Offered Service
InternalValueOfferedService.description: Offered Service is the instance of a specific flight or Service Definition as it has been offered (and eventually ordered and consumed) in the context of a specific Offer and/or Order. At the time of shopping, a service can be sold to multiple passengers on a given journey. At time of order, the services should be applied to a single passenger on a single segment.

airlineTaxonomy.title: Each Internal Value Offered Service may have associated Service Taxonomies one or more Airline Taxonomies
airlineTaxonomy.description: Used in the context of the Airline Taxonomy to define a product or service to the seller or to request a collection of products and services from an airline. For more information on what values should be placed within these fields, see the implementation guide at: https://guides.developer.iata.org

internalValue.title: Each Internal Value Offered Service must have one and only one Accounted Price
internalValue.description: An amount of money expected, required, or given in payment for something.

inventoryGuaranteeDateTime.title: Internal Value Offered Service.Inventory Guarantee Date Time
inventoryGuaranteeDateTime.description: The length of time inventory against a given Service is guaranteed. If inventory is not guaranteed, the Order creation (or change) may fail. In the absence of a time limit, no inventory is guaranteed. Notes: The presence of an inventory guarantee does not assume a guarantee of price. For the price to be guaranteed against a given Offer Item, the Price Guarantee Time Limit must also be present. The assumption is that inventory is held when an Order is created (or changed), so this time limit only applies in the context of an Offer.

paxRefIdentifier.title: Internal Value Offered Service.Passenger Reference Identifier
paxRefIdentifier.description: Reference to a Passenger ID within this message

richMedia.title: Each Internal Value Offered Service may one or more Media Resource References
richMedia.description: An external resource such as an Image, Video, PDF or other which is available for display

serviceIdentifier.title: Internal Value Offered Service.Service Identifier
serviceIdentifier.description: Uniquely Identifies a Service within the context of one message.

serviceRefIdentifier.title: Internal Value Offered Service.Service Reference Identifier

statusCode.title: Internal Value Offered Service.Status Code
statusCode.description: Status of the Offered Service Status instance. See ATSB Codeset OfferedService for possible values.

JourneyStageTypeCodeEnum.title: Journey Stage Type Code
JourneyStageTypeCodeEnum.description: Used PADIS Codeset FAT Fare or application penalty type. BUT this is used generically to indicate stages of a journey Contains list of Stages of a flight journey. NO SHOW. PRIOR TO DEPARTURE. AFTER DEPARTURE. Valid Values: After Departure - After Departure Any time after a journey segment which was included in the offer/order item has taken place irrespective of whether the segment was flown or not.; No Show - No Show When passenger(s) have not turned up for any of the flights in the itinerary.; Prior To Departure - Prior to Departure Any time before the first flight segment but after payment received.

dataLists.description: Data List definition for this message.

Can be a regular Offer or an A La Carte Offer. A La Carte Offer is defined as a container for A La Carte Offer Items. This supports a shopping basket concept for non-flight services. The main purpose of this structure is to reduce the size of the messages by inserting Offer Items which are applicable to multiple flight-related Offers. NB. For the OfferID of the ALaCarteOffer: Default OfferID identifier for A La Carte Offer Items in a scenario where items here are not selected for a flight-related Offer above. Can be a regular Offer or an A La Carte Offer. A La Carte Offer is defined as a container for A La Carte Offer Items. This supports a shopping basket concept for non-flight services. The main purpose of this structure is to reduce the size of the messages by inserting Offer Items which are applicable to multiple flight-related Offers. NB. For the OfferID of the ALaCarteOffer: Default OfferID identifier for A La Carte Offer Items in a scenario where items here are not selected for a flight-related Offer above. ParticipatingOrg.description: An organized structure set up for a particular purpose, such as a business, government body, department, charity, or financial institution.

Pax.description: Any person except members of the crew carried or to be carried with the consent of the carrier, on board of any transport vehicle such as aircraft, train, bus, ship. Holds the attributes specific to a one booking, from shopping to fulfillment.

ageMeasure.title: Passenger.Age Measure
ageMeasure.description: The Age of the Passenger. To be used in NDC Anonymous Shopping requests or when the birthdate (in Individual) is not known.

birthdate.title: Passenger.Birthdate
birthdate.description: The Date of Birth of the Passenger. Intended to be used in NDC Anonymous Shopping requests. Example: 2017-01-13

citizenshipCountryCode.title: Passenger.Citizenship Country Code
citizenshipCountryCode.description: ISO Country Code (can be extended by bilateral agreement in case of exceptions, e.g. Kosovo). Examples: US, FR.

contactInfoRefIdentifier.title: Passenger.Contact Info Reference Identifier
contactInfoRefIdentifier.description: Uniquely Identifies a set of Contact Information, within the context of one message.

paxIdentifier.title: Passenger.Passenger Identifier
paxIdentifier.description: Uniquely identifies a Passenger within the context of one message.

paxRefIdentifier.description: For use from in-lap passenger instance, to reference the adult passenger with whom they are travelling.

profileConsentInd.description: When TRUE, passenger authorizes the airline to share his/her profile information or send promotional emails.

distanceMeasure.description: Total distance between the beginning and end stations of a leg, measured by the great circle of the earth.

birthplaceText.description: Country Code where the Passenger was born (ISO 3166). For example: DE

titleName.description: A word such as Mr., Mrs., Miss or Dr that is used before an individual's name to indicate the gender, profession or marital status.

cardProductTypeCode.description: Used to specify whether the card is a Consumer (personal) or Commercial (corporate) card.

clearanceMethods.description: These are the clearance options with their supporting information proposed by the carrier for a given offer. It supplies the methods available to clear a payment. It is part of the 'Payment Supported Method', and it is relevant whenever the method of payment will require clearance of funds between the partners of the sale. Includes the Commission data to allow the carrier to support choices that are in line with its payment policy.

cryptographyKey.title: Each Payment Supported Method may Has a one and only one Cryptography Key

paymentBrandCode.description: A Payment Brand code assigned according to ATS Codeset PAYB. Example VI for Visa

paymentRedirectionInd.description: Indicates that an Airline will capture payment via a separate hosted payment platform, e.g. via a URI generated by an airline's payment platform

paymentTypeCode.title: Payment Supported Method.Payment Type Code
paymentTypeCode.description: A Payment Type code assigned according to ATS Codeset PAYT. For example: 'CC' for Customer Card.

paymentTimeLimitDateTime.description: A date/time by which payment commitment is required for a given Order Item. For example: PaymentTimeLimitDateTime: '2018-01-01T12:00:00Z' shows a static payment commitment date/time for a given Order Item.

PaymentTimeLimitDuration.description: A container for a payment time limit duration.

paymentTimeLimitDuration.description: Duration from the Order creation date by which payment commitment is required for a given Order Item. For example: PaymentTimeLimitDuration: 'PT48H3M6S' shows the amount of time after Order is created/changed that payment commitment must be made for a given Order Item. PaymentTimeLimitDuration: 'PT0H0M0S' indicates instant payment is required for a given Order Item.

PaymentTypeCode.description: Additional payment type codes for use in Enhanced and Simplified, refer to IATA code set PAYT

baseAmountGuaranteeTimeLimitDateTime.title: Price.Base Amount Guarantee Time Limit Date Time
baseAmountGuaranteeTimeLimitDateTime.description: The length of time the Base Amount of an offer item is guaranteed. In the absence of the Base Amount guarantee time limit, the Base Amount is not guaranteed. Upon expiry, the Base Amount may no longer be guaranteed and either a new shopping process should begin, or the offer should be repriced resulting in a new Offer. Should the Base Amount guarantee time limit extend beyond Order creation, the remaining length of time persists into the corresponding Order Item. The airline can increase the remaining length of time beyond the original time limit should they wish to. This field should only be used when the Airline indicates that a Price Guarantee is available.

curConversion.title: Each Price may has one or more Currency Conversions
curConversion.description: The result of converting one currency into another currency. E.g. local currency to USD, air miles to monetary.

equivAmount.title: Price.Equivalent Amount
equivAmount.description: The entire amount of transaction stated in the local currency at the point of sale, or the currency as defined by the Currency Indicator Code.

loyaltyUnitName.title: Price.Loyalty Unit Name

maskedInd.title: Price.Masked Indicator

tfcSummary.title: Each Price may have component one and only one TFC Summary

totalAmount.title: Price.Total Amount
