RbdCode.description: Additional BDT to specify the RBD as defined in AIRIMP and SSIM.

RbdCodeEnum.title: RBD Code
RbdCodeEnum.description: Enumeration values of RBD Codes as per PADIS codeset 9800.

displayInd.title: Remark.Display Indicator
displayInd.description: When TRUE, this remark should be displayed. Notes: 1. This capability may not be supported by all NDC-enabled systems or may be supported by bilateral agreement only. The technical implementation of this capability is not dictated by this specification.

remarkText.title: Remark.Remark Text
remarkText.description: Additional, supplementary information about the document or service.

RemittanceResponsibilityCode.title: Remittance Responsibility Code
RemittanceResponsibilityCode.description: Indicates accountability party responsible for remitting TFC to authority

RemittanceResponsibilityCodeEnum.title: Remittance Responsibility Code
RemittanceResponsibilityCodeEnum.description: Enumeration of codes that indicate the accountable entity responsible for remitting TFC to authority. Valid Values: OC - Operating Carrier; OO - Order Owner; OT - Other

RemittanceTimeCode.title: Remittance Time Code
RemittanceTimeCode.description: Indicates the timing of the TFC liability

RemittanceTimeCodeEnum.title: Remittance Time Code
RemittanceTimeCodeEnum.description: Enumeration to specify the remittance timing of the liability of the TFC Valid Values: D - Delivery; S - Sale

RficCode.title: RFIC Code
RficCode.description: Additional BDT to specify the reason for issuance code.

RficCodeEnum.title: RFIC Code
RficCodeEnum.description: Enumeration values for Reason for Issuance codes.

RfiscCode.title: RFISC Code
RfiscCode.description: Additional BDT to specify the reason for issuance sub code.

RfiscCodeEnum.title: RFISC Code
RfiscCodeEnum.description: Enumeration values for Reason for Issuance sub codes. Examples: 0CC (First Checked Bag). 0B1 (In-flight Entertainment). 0BX (Lounge). 0B3 (Meal/ Beverage). 0B5 (Pre-reserved Seat Assignment). 0G6 (Priority Boarding).

RouteTypeCode.title: Route Type Code
RouteTypeCode.description: Type of routing for which TFC applies.

RouteTypeCodeEnum.title: Route Type Code
RouteTypeCodeEnum.description: Enumeration of the type of routing codes for which TFC is applicable. Valid Values: Domestic - Domestic; International - International; Regional - Regional

SalesAgent.title: Sales Agent
SalesAgent.description: An individual conducting sales activities on behalf of a sales branch or organization.

salesAgentIdentifier.title: Sales Agent.Sales Agent Identifier
salesAgentIdentifier.description: The unique identifier of the sales agent. This value must be accompanied by the appropriate Sales Branch Identifier or Organization Identifier to ensure uniqueness.

SalesBranch.title: Sales Branch
SalesBranch.description: An organizational unit with responsibility over sales in a market, for a product or service and under any other specified criteria.

salesBranchIdentifier.title: Sales Branch.Sales Branch Identifier
salesBranchIdentifier.description: The industry wide unique identifier of the sales branch. Commonly, a value from the Pseudo City Code may be used, or a bi-latterly agreed code. When the latter it must only be used between parties that hold an appropriate translation.

SeatCharacteristicCodeEnum.title: Seat Characteristic Code
SeatCharacteristicCodeEnum.description: Refers to aircraft seat characteristic codes e.g. A (Aisle seat), E (Exit and emergency exit). See PADIS code list 9825.

SeatProfile.title: Seat Profile
SeatProfile.description: Airline defined group of seats sharing common characteristics.

marketingInfo.title: Each Seat Profile may has one or more Descriptions
marketingInfo.description: An account or representation of the certain or major aspects, characteristics, or features of a person, object, or event.

richMedia.title: Each Seat Profile may one or more Media Resource References
richMedia.description: An external resource such as an Image, Video, PDF or other which is available for display

seatCharacteristicCode.title: Seat Profile.Seat Characteristic Code
seatCharacteristicCode.description: Characteristic of an aircraft seat e.g. A (Aisle seat), E (Exit and emergency exit),..., according to PADIS code list 9825.

seatPitchMeasure.title: Seat Profile.Seat Pitch Measure
seatPitchMeasure.description: Measure of a given seat's pitch.

seatProfileIdentifier.title: Seat Profile.Seat Profile Identifier
seatProfileIdentifier.description: Unique identifier associated to this Seat Profile.

seatWidthMeasure.title: Seat Profile.Seat Width Measure
seatWidthMeasure.description: Measure of a given seat's width.

seatProfile.title: Each Seat Profile List must Has one or more seat profiles at least one Seat Profiles
seatProfile.description: Airline defined group of seats sharing common characteristics.

SecurePaymentAuthenticationVersion.title: Secure Payment Authentication Version
SecurePaymentAuthenticationVersion.description: Used by Seller if 3D-Secure is supported. Seller can specify which version of 3D-Secure is supported. Note: 3D-Secure context should be used when the Customer-Seller interaction type is web and/or mobile.

cardEnrollmentVersionText.title: Secure Payment Authentication Version.Card Enrollment Version Text
cardEnrollmentVersionText.description: The authentication request for the 3-D Secure transaction.

supportedVersionText.title: Secure Payment Authentication Version.Supported Version Text
supportedVersionText.description: Version of 3-D secure being used in this payment transaction. Possible values '3DS2'

SegmentConnectionTypeCode.title: Segment Connection Type Code
SegmentConnectionTypeCode.description: Specifies the type of connection between origin and destination: Transit, Transfer, Stopover.

SegmentConnectionTypeCodeEnum.title: Segment Connection Type Code
SegmentConnectionTypeCodeEnum.description: Enumeration set for the type of connection for a segment origin and destination. Valid Values: Stopover - Stopover; Transfer - Transit; Transit - Transit

SegmentTypeCode.title: Segment Type Code
SegmentTypeCode.description: BDT referencing the Segment Type as per PADIS codeset (Flight Segment Type).

ServiceDefinition.title: Service Definition
ServiceDefinition.description: Description and characteristics of a non-flight product or service that can be separately sold and delivered. E.g. bag, seat, meal on a flight. Business Identifier Fields: - [Shopping Response] Shopping Response ID - [Carrier] Airline Designator Code - Service Definition ID

airlineTaxonomy.title: Each Service Definition may have one or more one or more Airline Taxonomies
airlineTaxonomy.description: Used in the context of the Airline Taxonomy to define a product or service to the seller or to request a collection of products and services from an airline. For more information on what values should be placed within these fields, see the implementation guide at: https://guides.developer.iata.org

depositTimeLimitDateTime.title: Service Definition.Deposit Time Limit Date Time
depositTimeLimitDateTime.description: DEPRECATED - This element is deprecated as of 26.1 and will be decommissioned in a future release of the standards. Please consult implementation guidance on alternatives to this element. The date by which a deposit must be paid for an order Examples: 2015-01-13T13:59:38Z

desc.title: Each Service Definition may has one or more Descriptions
desc.description: An account or representation of the certain or major aspects, characteristics, or features of a person, object, or event.

namingTimeLimitDateTime.title: Service Definition.Naming Time Limit Date Time
namingTimeLimitDateTime.description: DEPRECATED - This element is deprecated as of 26.1 and will be decommissioned in a future release of the standards. Please consult implementation guidance on alternatives to this element. The time by which an Order must be completed with individual passenger names. Examples: 2015-01-13T13:59:38Z

ownerCode.title: Service Definition.Owner Code
ownerCode.description: Airline code assigned to a carrier. Either ICAO-defined 3-character code or IATA-defined 2-character code.

rfic.title: Service Definition.RFIC
rfic.description: Reason For Issuance Code Examples: A (Air Transportation) C (Baggage) E (Airport Services) F (Merchandise) G (In-flight Services)

rfisc.title: Service Definition.RFISC
rfisc.description: Reason For Issuance Sub Code. Examples: 0CC (First Checked Bag) 0B1 (In-flight Entertainment) 0BX (Lounge)

serviceCode.title: Service Definition.Service Code
serviceCode.description: Airline specific service code which can be associated with the Reason for Issuance Sub Code. Sample implementer encoding: XLEG for Extra Leg Room Seat XBAG for Extra Bag

serviceDefinitionIdentifier.title: Service Definition.Service Definition Identifier
serviceDefinitionIdentifier.description: Uniquely Identifies a Service Definition within the context of one message.

serviceDefinition.title: Each Service Definition List must at least one Service Definitions
serviceDefinition.description: Description and characteristics of a non-flight product or service that can be separately sold and delivered. E.g. bag, seat, meal on a flight. Business Identifier Fields: - [Shopping Response] Shopping Response ID - [Carrier] Airline Designator Code - Service Definition ID

Station.title: Station
Station.description: Location or facility where air or surface transportation originates, stops and/or terminates, and where passengers and/or cargo can be taken on or off. Those of relevance to the airline industry are identified by an IATA Location Identifier (3 letter location identifier). There are also additional airports without an IATA identifier that may be used in disruption scenarios that will be identified by an ICAO 4 letter code (assigned to every registered airport, military or civil). Business Identifier Fields: - IATA Location Code

iataLocationCode.title: Station.IATA Location Code
iataLocationCode.description: IATA 3-letter code defining the city or airport code.

stationName.title: Station.Station Name
stationName.description: Name of the station. E.g. George Bush Intercontinental Airport.

StationName.title: Station Name
StationName.description: Data type information for Station Name.

value.title: Station_ Name.Content
value.description: Content value information for Station Name.

StopOverRestrictions.title: Stop Over Restrictions
StopOverRestrictions.description: Additional information supplied by the Airline for the current Itinerary to advise the Seller that additional options could be available (if the Seller changes the request) to add Stop Overs within the itinerary.

availInd.title: Stop Over Restrictions.Availability Indicator
availInd.description: Boolean to signify that Stop Overs are possible, and could be searched for on this itinerary.

chargeableInd.title: Stop Over Restrictions.Chargeable Indicator
chargeableInd.description: An indicator to identify if the Stopover has an associated fee.

maximumStopOversPermittedQty.title: Stop Over Restrictions.Maximum Stop Overs Permitted Quantity
maximumStopOversPermittedQty.description: If Stop overs are available, this element places an optional limit to the number of stopovers that can be added to the itinerary.

paxRefIdentifier.title: Stop Over Restrictions.Passenger Reference Identifier
paxRefIdentifier.description: Used to store a ref to the passenger.

SupplementName.title: Supplement Name
SupplementName.description: BDT with value constraints for short supplements to proper names, such as Title, Suffix, etc.

value.title: Supplement_ Name.Content
value.description: BDT with value constraints for short supplements to proper names, such as Title, Suffix, etc.

amount.title: Tax Exemption Information.Amount
amount.description: The amount of the tax being exempted

amountBeforeExemptionAmount.title: Tax Exemption Information.Amount Before Exemption Amount
amountBeforeExemptionAmount.description: The amount of the tax before exemption

TaxIdentityInfo.title: Tax Identity Information
TaxIdentityInfo.description: The information related to the tax identity of an individual or organization.

issuingCountryCode.title: Tax Identity Information.Issuing Country Code
issuingCountryCode.description: The code for the country that issued the tax identification document.

taxIdentityDocIdentifier.title: Tax Identity Information.Tax Identity Document Identifier
taxIdentityDocIdentifier.description: The document number of either the individual or company who will be reclaiming taxes.

taxIdentityName.title: Tax Identity Information.Tax Identity Name
taxIdentityName.description: Name of registered Tax Identity. Example: Clave Unica de Identificacion Tributaria is the name for TaxID CUIT

TaxIdentitySummary.title: Tax Identity Summary
TaxIdentitySummary.description: Summary of the Tax Identity information, Payer and Postal Address.

payerName.title: Payer Name
payerName.description: Identifies the individual or organization responsible for payment of the TFC.

oneOf.title: Each Tax Identity Summary must Is a Payer one and only one Payer Individual
oneOf.description: A Payer individual is a specialisation of the individual type defined as: A single human being as distinct from a group, class, or family.

oneOf.title: Each Tax Identity Summary must Is a Payer one and only one Payer Organisation
oneOf.description: Payer Organization is a specialization of the organization type defined as: is an organized structure set up for a particular purpose, such as a business, government body, department, charity, or financial institution.

taxIdentityAddress.title: Each Tax Identity Summary must be associated to one and only one Postal Address
taxIdentityAddress.description: Natural or physical address used for postal service. May be a building address, airport address, etc.

taxIdentityInfo.title: Each Tax Identity Summary must be identified one and only one Tax Identity Information
taxIdentityInfo.description: The information related to the tax identity of an individual or organization.

TaxonomyCode.title: Taxonomy Code
TaxonomyCode.description: A code defining a product or service within the Shared Industry Taxonomy or bilaterally. Refer to EASD Codeset https://guides.developer.iata.org

TaxonomyCodeEnum.title: Taxonomy Code
TaxonomyCodeEnum.description: The code for a product or service within the Shared Industry Taxonomy or bilaterally. Refer to EASD Codeset implementation Guide. https://guides.developer.iata.org

Term.title: Term
Term.description: Condition under which an agreement is reached.

desc.title: Each Term may have one and only one Description
desc.description: An account or representation of the certain or major aspects, characteristics, or features of a person, object, or event.

termIdentifier.title: Term.Term Identifier
termIdentifier.description: Unique identifier associated to a term instance.

term.title: Each Terms List must has one or more at least one Terms
term.description: Condition under which an agreement is reached.

Text.title: Text
Text.description: Text is a character string such as a finite set of characters generally in the form of words of a language.

value.title: Text.Content
value.description: A character string (I.e. a finite set of characters) generally in the form of words of a language.

TfcAppTypeCode.title: TFC Application Type Code
TfcAppTypeCode.description: Codes indicating how TFC is applied. Refer to ATSB Codeset TFCAP.

TfcAppTypeCodeEnum.title: TFC Application Type Code
TfcAppTypeCodeEnum.description: The codelist contents of IATA Codeset TFCAP.

TfcAuthority.title: TFC Authority
TfcAuthority.description: Entity that imposes or administers the applicable TFC. This element should be considered mandatory except for the data exchange between Retailer and Seller

authorityTypeCode.title: TFC Authority.Authority Type Code
authorityTypeCode.description: Indicates the nature of the TFC recipient. Refer to ATSB Codeset TFCAuthorityTypeCode (TFCAT)

authorityTypeName.title: TFC Authority.Authority Type Name
authorityTypeName.description: Name of the recipient party. For example HM Treasury.

contactInfoRefIdentifier.title: TFC Authority.Contact Information Reference Identifier
contactInfoRefIdentifier.description: Reference to the contact details of the recipient party

TfcAuthorityTypeCode.title: TFC Authority Type Code
TfcAuthorityTypeCode.description: Indicates nature of TFC Recipient Authority creation, update or removal action. Refer to ATSB Codeset TFCAT.

TfcAuthorityTypeCodeEnum.title: TFC Authority Type Code
TfcAuthorityTypeCodeEnum.description: The codelist contents of IATA Codeset TFCAT recipient authority (to create) indicating the nature of the TFC recipient.

TfcCategoryCode.title: TFC Category Code
TfcCategoryCode.description: Codes that classify Taxes, Fees, and Charges by payer type (airline, passenger), travel type (domestic, international), travel direction (departure, arrival), or charge reason (facility, airport, travel/transportation, customs/immigration). Refer to ATSB Codeset TFCCategory (TFCC)

TfcCategoryCodeEnum.title: TFC Category Code
TfcCategoryCodeEnum.description: The codelist contents of IATA Codeset TFC category codes (TFCC to create)

TfcCode.title: TFC Code
TfcCode.description: Two character alpha numeric TFC code according to IATA Resolution 728

value.title: TFC_ Code.Content
value.description: Code BDT of two character alpha numeric TFC code according to IATA Resolution 728

TfcExemptionReasonCode.title: TFC Exemption Reason Code
TfcExemptionReasonCode.description: Code list of TFC Exemption Reason. Refer to ATSB Codeset TFC Exemption Reason Codes (TFCE), not exhaustive.

TfcExemptionReasonCodeEnum.title: TFC Exemption Reason Code
TfcExemptionReasonCodeEnum.description: The codelist contents of IATA Codeset TFC Exemption Reason codes (TFCE)

TfcHandlingFee.title: TFC Handling Fee
TfcHandlingFee.description: Information about any fee the airline may retain from the TFC amount. For example: Passenger Facility Charge PFC (Tax code XF) Airline can keep 0.11 USD.

handlingFeeAmount.title: TFC Handling Fee.Handling Fee Amount
handlingFeeAmount.description: The handling fee amount retained by the airline, when a fixed amount method is applied.

handlingFeeInd.title: TFC Handling Fee.Handling Fee Indicator
handlingFeeInd.description: Indicates whether a handling fee may be retained by the airline from the TFC amount

handlingFeeMethodCode.title: TFC Handling Fee.Handling Fee Method Code
handlingFeeMethodCode.description: Method used to determine the handling fee, such as a fixed amount or a percentage.

handlingFeePercent.title: TFC Handling Fee.Handling Fee Percent
handlingFeePercent.description: The percentage rate applied to the TFC amount to calculate the handling fee, when a rate-based method is used.

handlingFeePublishedAmount.title: TFC Handling Fee.Handling Fee Published Amount
handlingFeePublishedAmount.description: The published or standard handling fee amount, if applicable

TfcHandlingFeeMethodCode.title: TFC Handling Fee Method Code
TfcHandlingFeeMethodCode.description: BDT establishes if TFC Handling Fee Method is Fixed or Rate based

TfcHandlingFeeMethodCodeEnum.title: TFC Handling Fee Method Code
TfcHandlingFeeMethodCodeEnum.description: Enumeration for TFC Handling Fee Method Code Valid Values: F - Fixed; P - Percent

TfcInfo.title: TFC Information
TfcInfo.description: Information about a tax, fee, or charge imposed by Government or an Authority (such as Civil Aviation, Airport) or Airport Operators, etc.

amount.title: TFC Information.Amount
amount.description: Amount of the applicable TFC, or net of applicable handling fee. Example: 150.00 USD

appTypeCode.title: TFC Information.Application Type Code
appTypeCode.description: Indicates how TFC is applied. Refer to ATSB Codeset TFCAP.

collectionPointTax.title: Each TFC Information may be collected at one or more Collection Point Taxs
collectionPointTax.description: Tax data breakdown by collection point for XF(Passenger Facility Fee) and ZP(federal tax segment) taxes.

curConversion.title: Each TFC Information may be applied to one and only one Currency Conversion
curConversion.description: The result of converting one currency into another currency. E.g. local currency to USD, air miles to monetary.

descText.title: TFC Information.Description Text
descText.description: Tax short description. For example, $4 per flight segment, per passenger (U.S. domestic segment tax)

flightAssociation.title: Flight Association
flightAssociation.description: Associates either the operating flight leg or the flight segment to which a TFC applies

oneOf.title: Each TFC Information must is a TFC Flight Association one and only one Dated Operating Leg Reference
oneOf.description: Reference to a Dated Operating Leg within this message

oneOf.title: Each TFC Information must is a TFC Flight Association one and only one Passenger Segment Reference
oneOf.description: Reference to a PaxSegmentID. This will be a reference to a single passenger segment that will be defined in a data list or pax segment list in the contained message.

jurisdiction.title: Each TFC Information may be subject to one and only one Jurisdiction
jurisdiction.description: The legal authority to impose, administer, and collect taxes within a defined scope based on territory, persons, or economic activity.

pointOfSale.title: Each TFC Information must be subject to one and only one Point Of Sale
pointOfSale.description: Country and Sub-division of sale of goods or services.

refundInd.title: TFC Information.Refund Indicator
refundInd.description: Indicates whether the TFC is refundable

remittanceResponsibilityCode.title: TFC Information.Remittance Responsibility Code
remittanceResponsibilityCode.description: Indicates which is the accountable entity who is responsible for remitting TFC to authority

remittanceTimeCode.title: TFC Information.Remittance Time Code
remittanceTimeCode.description: Indicates the remittance timing of the liability of the TFC

serviceRefIdentifier.title: TFC Information.Service Reference Identifier
serviceRefIdentifier.description: Reference to the service to which the TFC is applicable to. This element should be considered mandatory except for the data exchange between Retailer and Seller.

tfcAuthority.title: Each TFC Information may be managed by one and only one TFC Authority
tfcAuthority.description: Entity that imposes or administers the applicable TFC. This element should be considered mandatory except for the data exchange between Retailer and Seller

tfcCategoryCode.title: TFC Information.TFC Category Code
tfcCategoryCode.description: Codes that classify TFCs by payer type, travel type, travel direction, or charge reason. Refer to ATSB Codeset TFCC.

tfcCode.title: TFC Information.TFC Code
tfcCode.description: Unique identifier for tax specifications and reporting, a two character alpha numeric TFC code according to IATA Resolution 728

tfcComputationDate.title: TFC Information.TFC Computation Date
tfcComputationDate.description: Local date of where the computation of the TFC was done

tfcHandlingFee.title: Each TFC Information may be subject to one and only one TFC Handling Fee
tfcHandlingFee.description: Information about any fee the airline may retain from the TFC amount. For example: Passenger Facility Charge PFC (Tax code XF) Airline can keep 0.11 USD.

tfcJustification.title: Each TFC Information may be justified by one and only one TFC Justification
tfcJustification.description: Reason for applying or exempting the TFC.

tfcName.title: TFC Information.TFC Name
tfcName.description: Name of the TFC. For example Air Passenger Duty, Passenger Service Charge.

tfcPublishedValue.title: Each TFC Information must be published one and only one TFC Published Value
tfcPublishedValue.description: Published value of the TFC expressed either as a fixed amount or a percentage at time of computation

tfcTypeNumber.title: TFC Information.TFC Type Number
tfcTypeNumber.description: A unique identifier assigned to a specific business application of a tax, even when multiple applications use the same TFC_Code.

TfcJustification.title: TFC Justification
TfcJustification.description: Reason for applying or exempting the TFC.

amountAppliedPercent.title: TFC Justification.Amount Applied Percent
amountAppliedPercent.description: Monetary value on which a percentage-based TFC is calculated

applicableDistancePointCode.title: Each TFC Justification may be applicable by one and only one Station
applicableDistancePointCode.description: Furthest point in itinerary required for tax justification Example: OY (German Air travel tax), GB (APD tax). Usually defined as a station code.

paxRefIdentifier.title: TFC Justification.Passenger Reference Identifier
paxRefIdentifier.description: Reference to a Passenger ID within this message

routeTypeCode.title: TFC Justification.Route Type Code
routeTypeCode.description: Specifies the type of routing for which TFC is applicable. The information is intended for internal use only between airline and accounting.

segmentTypeCode.title: TFC Justification.Segment Type Code
segmentTypeCode.description: Specifies the type of connection between origin and destination

taxIdentitySummary.title: Each TFC Justification may be identified as one and only one Tax Identity Summary
taxIdentitySummary.description: Summary of the Tax Identity information, Payer and Postal Address.

tfcExemptionReasonCode.title: TFC Justification.TFC Exemption Reason Code
tfcExemptionReasonCode.description: First reason for exemption to support tax declaration. Should be populated only if the tax is exempted. Refer to ATSB Codeset TFC Exemption Reason Code (TFCE).

tfcJustificationReasonCode.title: TFC Justification.TFC Justification Reason Code
tfcJustificationReasonCode.description: Explains how tax was selected and justify the values paid to authorities. Refer to ATSB Codeset TFC Justification Reason Code (TFCJ).

TfcJustificationReasonCode.title: TFC Justification Reason Code
TfcJustificationReasonCode.description: Code list of TFC Justification Reason. Refer to ATSB Codeset TFC Justification Reason Codes (TFCJ).

TfcJustificationReasonCodeEnum.title: TFC Justification Reason Code
TfcJustificationReasonCodeEnum.description: The codelist contents of IATA Codeset TFC Justification Reason codes (TFCJ)

TfcPublishedValue.title: TFC Published Value
TfcPublishedValue.description: Published value of the TFC expressed either as a fixed amount or a percentage at time of computation

amountAppliedPercent.title: TFC Published Value.Amount Applied Percent
amountAppliedPercent.description: Amount to which the published percentage rate is applied to determine the TFC

rateTypeCode.title: TFC Published Value.Rate Type Code
rateTypeCode.description: Code identifying if TFC is fixed or based on a percentage

tfcPublishedAmount.title: TFC Published Value.TFC Published Amount
tfcPublishedAmount.description: Published fixed amount of the TFC

tfcPublishedPercent.title: TFC Published Value.TFC Published Percent
tfcPublishedPercent.description: Published percentage used to calculate the TFC

TfcRateTypeCode.title: TFC Rate Type Code
TfcRateTypeCode.description: BDT establishes if TFC is fixed (F) or based on a percentage (P)

TfcRateTypeCodeEnum.title: TFC Rate Type Code
TfcRateTypeCodeEnum.description: Codelist of TFC Rate Type Codes Valid Values: F - Fixed; P - Percentage

TfcSummary.title: TFC Summary
TfcSummary.description: Taxes, fees and charges (TFC) summary information

guaranteeTimeLimitDateTime.title: TFC Summary.Guarantee Time Limit Date Time
guaranteeTimeLimitDateTime.description: The length of time the Tax of an offer item is guaranteed. In the absence of the Tax guarantee time limit, the Tax is not guaranteed. Upon expiry, the Tax may no longer be guaranteed and either a new shopping process should begin, or the offer should be repriced resulting in a new Offer. Should the Tax guarantee time limit extend beyond Order creation, the remaining length of time persists into the corresponding Order Item. The airline can increase the remaining length of time beyond the original time limit should they wish to. This field should only be used when the Airline indicates that a Price Guarantee is available.

refundMethodText.title: TFC Summary.Refund Method Text
refundMethodText.description: Information from the Airline detailing to the Customer how the tax refund will be processed and what the Customer has to do for the refund.

tfcInfo.title: Each TFC Summary may have one or more TFC Informations
tfcInfo.description: Information about a tax, fee, or charge imposed by Government or an Authority (such as Civil Aviation, Airport) or Airport Operators, etc.

totalAmount.title: TFC Summary.Total Amount
totalAmount.description: Total of all applicable TFC amounts included in the price. If TFC breakdowns are provided, this amount should match the sum of the TFC breakdown amounts.

totalRefundableAmount.title: TFC Summary.Total Refundable Amount
totalRefundableAmount.description: The total amount of all refundable taxes as calculated by the Airline.

TfcTypeNumberCode.title: TFC Type Number Code
TfcTypeNumberCode.description: A sequence number between 001 and 999 assigned to render TFC Information unique, when TFC Code is not sufficient

value.title: TFC Type Number_ Code.Content
value.description: Code BDT of 3-digit sequence number from 001 to 999, leading zeroe(s)

TravelAgency.title: Travel Agency
TravelAgency.description: A private retailer or public service that provides travel and tourism related services to the public on behalf of suppliers such as activities, airlines, car rentals, cruise lines, hotels, railways, travel insurance, and package tours.

agencyIdentifier.title: Travel Agency.Agency Identifier
agencyIdentifier.description: Unique Agency Seller ID. Example: CTRV

contactInfo.title: Each Travel Agency may have one or more one or more Contact Informations
contactInfo.description: The electronic or geographic address which a party has provided as the contact channel. For example, contact email, contact postal address, contact phone number.

pseudoCityIdentifier.title: Travel Agency.Pseudo City Identifier
pseudoCityIdentifier.description: An identifier for a corporate user of a computer reservation system (CRS) or global distribution system (GDS), typically a travel agency. Also known as Office ID.

typeCode.title: Travel Agency.Type Code
typeCode.description: Agency type code. Examples TravelAgency, OnlineTravelAgency, or TravelManagementCompany.

TravelAgencyTypeCode.title: Travel Agency Type Code
TravelAgencyTypeCode.description: Additional BDT to specify travel agency type codes.

TravelAgencyTypeCodeEnum.title: Travel Agency Type Code
TravelAgencyTypeCodeEnum.description: Agency/ Agent Identification Type. Valid Values: OnlineTravelAgency - A Travel Agency operating Online; TravelAgency - A Travel Agency; TravelManagementCompany - A Travel Management Company

Uri.title: URI
Uri.description: A string of characters used to identify a resource. Such identification enables interaction with representations of the resource over a network, typically the World Wide Web, using specific protocols.

value.title: URI.Content
value.description: The value of the URI
